center.title: Print Center
center.subtitle: Navigate to a module and use your browser's print function (Ctrl+P / Cmd+P).
center.info: To print a report, open the corresponding module, apply your filters, then press Ctrl+P (or Cmd+P on Mac). All tables are print-optimised.

module.results: Print published academic results for your campus students.
module.students: Print the campus student list with matricule and class information.
module.attendance: Print attendance records filtered by date range or class.
module.examinations: Print examination session timetables and rosters.
module.documents: Print institutional documents published on your campus.
